mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_project ( pet_id, title, cover_title, cover_subtitle, dedication_text, template_code, book_spec_code, sweetbook_book_id, status ) VALUES ( #{petId}, #{title}, #{coverTitle}, #{coverSubtitle}, #{dedicationText}, #{templateCode}, #{bookSpecCode}, #{sweetbookBookId}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT book_project_id, pet_id, title, cover_title, cover_subtitle, dedication_text, template_code, book_spec_code, sweetbook_book_id, status, created_at, finalized_at FROM book_project WHERE book_project_id = #{bookProjectId}

SELECT book_project_id, pet_id, title, cover_title, cover_subtitle, dedication_text, template_code, book_spec_code, sweetbook_book_id, status, created_at, finalized_at FROM book_project ORDER BY book_project_id DESC

SELECT book_project_id, pet_id, title, cover_title, cover_subtitle, dedication_text, template_code, book_spec_code, sweetbook_book_id, status, created_at, finalized_at FROM book_project WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY book_project_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE book_project SET title = #{title}, cover_title = #{coverTitle}, cover_subtitle = #{coverSubtitle}, dedication_text = #{dedicationText}, template_code = #{templateCode}, book_spec_code = #{bookSpecCode}, status = #{status} WHERE book_project_id = #{bookProjectId}
UPDATE book_project SET status = #{status}, finalized_at = NOW() WHERE book_project_id = #{bookProjectId}
